audit_trail.name: Grayscale conversion
audit_trail.description: Collapsed RGB to single channel to eliminate chromatic noise from paper aging.

audit_trail.name: Background normalization
audit_trail.description: Estimated paper background via large morphological closing (kernel=35) then divided the image by it — removes uneven staining, vignette, and yellowing in one step.

audit_trail.name: CLAHE contrast enhancement
audit_trail.description: Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization with clipLimit=2.5 to recover faded ink without amplifying noise.

audit_trail.name: Non-local means denoising
audit_trail.description: Removed residual speckle while preserving letter edges (h=10, 7x7 patches, 21x21 search window).

audit_trail.name: Sauvola adaptive binarization
audit_trail.description: Local-statistics thresholding (window=25, k=0.2). Handles non-uniform background better than Otsu.

audit_trail.name: Speckle removal
audit_trail.description: Removed isolated dark blobs <15 px² via connected-component analysis (85,393 noise pixels eliminated).

audit_trail.name: Content-region crop
audit_trail.description: Cropped to text-dense region 2448×3264 px (offset 0, 0). Eliminates blank stained margins.

audit_trail.name: Deskew
audit_trail.description: Estimated skew via minAreaRect of text pixels and rotated by -0.00°.

audit_trail.name: OCR (Tesseract LSTM)
audit_trail.description: Extracted text with overall word confidence 42%. 25% of words classified high-conf (≥80).

audit_trail.name: Text-line layout analysis
audit_trail.description: Grouped 96 text lines from OCR block/paragraph/line indices; boxes colour-coded by mean line confidence.

audit_trail.name: Metadata extraction
audit_trail.description: Regex-based extraction found 9 date(s), 0 person(s), 3 place(s). Document type: unknown.

claude_vision_payload.note: Pass the full base64 of after_url to the LLM as a vision message; the model's OCR will outperform Tesseract on degraded text.
